use config path:/tmp/inspectra-static-ater.droplet.cli-7.2.4-ee4afbceb89047b6a544efcd39d280bb/xdg-data
Init config file success:/tmp/inspectra-static-ater.droplet.cli-7.2.4-ee4afbceb89047b6a544efcd39d280bb/xdg-data/.droplet-config.json
Description:
  Welcome use droplet cli, a tool to help you generate source code!

Usage:
  droplet [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  config                      config management
  dto <entity path>           generate entity dto files
  manager <entity path>       generate dtos, datastore, manager
  api, webapi <entity path>   generate dtos, datastore, manager,api controllers
  angular, ng <OpenApi Json>  generate angular service and interface using openApi json
  request <OpenApi Url>       generate request service and interface using openApi json
  view <entity path>          generate front view page, only support angular.
  doc <OpenApi Url>           generate models doc using openApi json
  sync                        sync angular service & page from swagger.json to ClientApp, please use this in Http.API path
  studio                      studio management

  config                      config management

  angular, ng <OpenApi Json>  generate angular service and interface using openApi json
  request <OpenApi Url>       generate request service and interface using openApi json
  view <entity path>          generate front view page, only support angular.
